channel.title: reactivex on ggblog
channel.description: Recent content in reactivex on ggblog

item.title: Back pressured thoughts
item.description: Node.js is perfect for scripting. With its well-stocked library, you can just drop a small amount of code to solve complicated problems. Add some ReactiveX-flavored code and you will be able to conquer the world. Anyone who has used Node.js for some time, probably knows very well the backpressure problem with streams. It’s when you define a readable stream (the source) and a writable stream (the target) but the writable stream is slower to process the data then the readable stream to output new data.
